Software Tester Contract
Mayo Clinic — Rochester, MN (Hybrid)Starting April 2026
  • Document, maintain, and execute well-structured manual test cases in support of several vended web and mobile applications within the provider and patient space.
  • Test vended applications and mobile/web apps, validating functionality, usability, and reliability across multiple product lines in a fast-paced healthcare environment.
  • Utilise Azure DevOps (ADO) for test case management, defect tracking, and sprint-based delivery aligned to both Agile and Waterfall methodologies.
  • Actively participate in stakeholder meetings and cross-functional discussions to clarify requirements, communicate testing progress, and ensure alignment between business needs and application behaviour.
  • Prioritise and manage testing workload across several product lines simultaneously, adapting to shifting timelines and feast-or-famine delivery cycles.
  • Proactively identify and close knowledge gaps — digging into vended application documentation, vendor JDs, and domain resources to build familiarity and find answers independently.
  • Leverage Aha! project development software to support roadmap visibility and coordinate work across development and QA teams.
IT Intern
Mayo Clinic — Remote, Cincinnati OHMay 2025 – Dec 2025
  • Engineered scalable full-stack features for RRaMP (Radiology Research Access Management Platform), delivering an IRB number filter and user-facing enhancements that streamlined clinical research study retrieval and drove measurable UX improvements.
  • Architected and maintained MongoDB database components — including dynamic questionnaire flows and custom business logic — while shipping RESTful APIs and responsive UI components in an Agile/Scrum environment aligned to sprint velocity and product roadmap goals.
  • Spearheaded end-to-end test automation across UI and API layers using Playwright, diagnosing and reducing flaky test failures by ~95%, and stabilizing Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines to achieve consistent, production-grade application reliability.
  • Collaborated closely with clinical researchers and technical stakeholders to translate real-world requirements into precise application features — demonstrating core Application Analyst competencies.
  • Recognized with two Above & Beyond awards for teamwork and contribution by senior team members and management at Mayo Clinic.
Peer Mentor — C2M Program
University of Cincinnati, Graduate SchoolMay 2025 – Dec 2025
  • Competitively selected from 100+ students for the Peer Lead Coach-to-Mentor Program, providing high-impact mentorship to guide incoming graduate students through academic, professional, and cultural transitions.
  • Delivered personalized one-on-one coaching on university resource navigation, faculty networking, research onboarding, and securing competitive internship opportunities.
  • Developed individualized action plans addressing academic challenges and long-term career strategy, consistently driving student confidence and measurable goal attainment.
Student Affairs Intern
Society of Women in Engineering, UCAug 2024 – May 2025
  • Orchestrated end-to-end logistics for high-attendance SWE events, driving a meaningful increase in first-year student participation and community engagement.
  • Championed inclusive STEM programming and cross-generational mentorship initiatives, bridging women in engineering with industry professionals, senior peers, and alumni networks.
Front-End Development Intern
Silver Touch Technologies Limited — Ahmedabad, IndiaJan 2024 – Apr 2024
  • Designed and developed a pixel-perfect, responsive UI for an enterprise Human Resource Management System, leveraging HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap to deliver an intuitive, accessibility-forward user experience.
  • Translated business requirements into reusable front-end components, collaborating cross-functionally to ensure seamless integration with backend services and alignment with product specifications.
  • Commended by Silver Touch Technologies for being highly motivated, adaptable, and professionally diligent — recognised as a valuable asset to the engineering team.

Gujarat Technological University — Ahmedabad, IndiaJul 2023 – Aug 2023
  • Designed and deployed an intelligent business process automation solution on AWS, integrating Blue Prism RPA to eliminate manual data workflows and reduce processing overhead through end-to-end pipeline automation.
  • Built robust, scalable data collection and processing pipelines that improved operational accuracy by 90%, demonstrating proficiency in Cloud Computing architecture (Scope of Cloud Computing with Industry 4.0).

Portfolio

Featured Projects

01 / PROJECT
Invent-ory: Automated Inventory Management System

Real-time stock management platform with an LLM-driven pricing recommendation engine. Deployed on AWS EC2 with RDS MySQL — featuring AI demand forecasting and automated restocking alerts for small-scale businesses.

LLM / AIAWS EC2 RDS MySQLAI Forecasting Full-Stack
Built an LLM-driven pricing engine integrated with real-time market data, plus an AI forecasting module trained on historical demand signals.
02 / PROJECT
Customer Sentiment Analysis & Sales Prediction Dashboard

End-to-end NLP pipeline using transformer-based sentiment models. Interactive Power BI dashboards with ML-powered sales forecasting for stakeholder decision-making.

Beyond the Resume

Leadership & Ventures

🏆 Sports & Leadership 🏀
Two-Time National Basketball Champion & Multi-Sport Athlete
Competing at the national level from a young age, Yashvi has built an enduring foundation of leadership, resilience, and disciplined teamwork — qualities she brings directly into every engineering and analyst role.
  • Won back-to-back national championships in basketball — elite performance under pressure, consistently elevating team outcomes.
  • Part of the Technical Management Department for the Corporate Basketball League, LJ Basketball Campus (May–Jun 2022).
  • Participated in a diverse range of sports throughout childhood and academics — building adaptability and a growth mindset.
  • Applies discipline and strategic thinking of competitive athletics directly to Agile sprint planning and team collaboration at Mayo Clinic.

🚀 Entrepreneurship 🌱
Co-Founder — AgriTech Startup (Horticulture Assistance Platform)
Co-founded a technology startup developing a precision-assist platform for horticulture farmers — gaining hands-on experience across product strategy, end-user research, competitive analysis, and stakeholder engagement.
  • Conducted in-depth competitive landscape analysis — identified market gaps and defined a differentiated value proposition for horticulture farmers.
  • Led direct field interviews and research sessions with farmers, translating qualitative insights into concrete product requirements.
  • Owned product architecture analysis — evaluated technical feasibility and designed system logic to maximise efficiency while minimising complexity.
  • Managed a diverse stakeholder ecosystem spanning academic advisors, industry collaborators, and prospective users.
  • Secured multiple letters of intent from stakeholders ready to collaborate post-deployment.
